title: Doki Doki Plushies!
description: Adds DDLC themed Plushes & Picture Frames.
body:
Adds craftable Plushes and Picture Frames.

For the plushies, you first need Fabric. Fabric is a shapeless recipe with 1 Paper and 1 White Wool. Using 4 Fabric around a certain wool color can give different colors.

Colors:

Pink - Natsuki

Orange - Sayori

Red - Monika

Purple - Yuri

Yellow - Kaori

The picture frames are crafted like Paintings, with sticks, but with stained glass with the same respective colors.

I hope you enjoy!

Monika Plush inspiration from a Monika Casual Outfit by [u/DestinyPVEGal](https://reddit.com/u/DestinyPvEGal)
Kaori is by [u/Monikas_Diary](https://www.reddit.com/user/Monikas_Diary/)
